name: Cities for Financial Empowerment Fund
description_short: Cities for Financial Empowerment Fund is a free credit assistance provider based in New York, New York. Rated 5.0/5 on Google.
description_long:
Cities for Financial Empowerment Fund is a free credit assistance provider serving clients in New York, New York. The company serves consumers in the New York area who are looking to access free credit counseling and financial guidance.

Cities for Financial Empowerment Fund specializes in free credit assistance services designed to help consumers access free credit counseling and financial guidance. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Non-profit and free credit assistance providers in New York offer valuable resources for consumers who need help but may not be able to afford paid services. Cities for Financial Empowerment Fund provides an important community service, and consumers should verify the organization's non-profit status and HUD-approval where applicable. Free counseling sessions can be a good starting point before committing to paid credit repair or debt relief programs.

Consumers in the New York, New York area who are considering Cities for Financial Empowerment Fund should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any free credit assistance provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
